pubmed_links: [Chen et al. (2021) Follistatin mediates learning and synaptic plasticity via regulation of Asic4 expression in the hippocampus](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34544873/)
summary: Follistatin (FST), an activin/BMP antagonist, is required for adult hippocampal neurogenesis, synaptic plasticity, spatial learning, and working memory, with brain-specific knockout mice showing LTP deficits; however, direct neuropsychiatric genetic evidence (e.g., GWAS or rare variant studies) for FST itself is absent, making it a biologically plausible but unvalidated psychiatric candidate. (novel candidate)
